shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to private foundation grants for women entrepreneurs. Discover 50+ foundations offering grants up to $250K for women-owned businesses. Funding available: up to $250K.
shortAnswerQuestion: What grants are available for women-owned businesses in 2026?

faq.question: Are private grants taxable?
faq.answer: Yes. Unless your business is a registered 501(c)(3) non-profit, grant money from private foundations is generally considered taxable income by the IRS.

faq.question: How competitive are private grants like Cartier or Tory Burch?
faq.answer: Extremely competitive. Programs like the Cartier Women's Initiative receive thousands of global applications for a handful of spots. Your business must demonstrate significant social/environmental impact, not just financial viability.

faq.question: Do private grants require a business plan?
faq.answer: Almost always. Private foundations want to see a clear path to sustainability and growth. They invest in the founder as much as the business model.

expertTip.title: Tell Your Story
expertTip.content: Private foundation grants favor compelling personal narratives over financial projections. Focus on your journey, mission, and community impact.
